recipes.title: Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Boil the pasta.
Fry the guanciale.
Mix eggs and cheese.
Combine all ingredients off the heat.

recipes.title: Chicken Curry
instructions: Sauté onions and garlic.
Add chicken and cook until browned.
Stir in curry powder.
Pour in coconut milk and simmer.

recipes.title: Chocolate Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C.
Mix dry ingredients.
Add eggs and mix well.
Bake for 30 minutes.

recipes.title: Caesar Salad
instructions: Chop the lettuce.
Grate the Parmesan cheese.
Toss lettuce with dressing.
Top with croutons and cheese.

recipes.title: Beef Tacos
instructions: Brown ground beef with onion in a skillet.
Season with cumin and chili powder.
Warm tortillas in a dry pan.
Fill tortillas with beef and desired toppings.

recipes.title: Margherita Pizza
instructions: Preheat oven to 250°C with a pizza stone inside.
Stretch dough into a thin round.
Spread passata and add torn mozzarella.
Bake 8–10 minutes until crust is golden.
Top with fresh basil and a drizzle of olive oil.

recipes.title: Fluffy Pancakes
instructions: Whisk dry ingredients together.
Mix buttermilk, egg, and butter in a separate bowl.
Fold wet into dry until just combined.
Cook on a greased griddle over medium heat until bubbles form, then flip.

recipes.title: Avocado Toast
instructions: Toast the bread until golden.
Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Spread avocado mixture on toast.
Top with red pepper flakes and poached eggs if desired.

recipes.title: Classic Cheeseburger
instructions: Divide beef into 4 patties and season with salt and pepper.
Cook patties on a hot grill or skillet 3–4 minutes per side.
Add cheese in the last minute to melt.
Assemble burgers with toppings and condiments.

recipes.title: Grilled Salmon
instructions: Mix olive oil, garlic, lemon zest, and dill.
Marinate salmon for 15 minutes.
Grill over medium-high heat 4–5 minutes per side.
Serve with lemon wedges.

recipes.title: Greek Salad
instructions: Combine tomatoes, cucumber, and onion in a bowl.
Add olives and crumble feta on top.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle oregano.
Toss gently and serve immediately.

recipes.title: French Onion Soup
instructions: Caramelize onions in butter over low heat for 40 minutes.
Add wine and cook 5 minutes, then add stock and simmer 20 minutes.
Ladle soup into oven-safe bowls.
Top with baguette slices and Gruyère, then broil until bubbly.

recipes.title: Blueberry Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 190°C and line a muffin tin.
Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
Whisk milk, oil, and eggs together, then fold into dry ingredients.
Gently fold in blueberries and fill muffin cups 3/4 full.
Bake 20–25 minutes until a toothpick comes out clean.

recipes.title: Pad Thai
ingredients: Bean sprouts, green onions, crushed peanuts for topping
instructions: Soak noodles in warm water for 30 minutes, then drain.
Stir-fry protein in a hot wok until cooked through.
Push to the side and scramble eggs.
Add noodles, fish sauce, tamarind, and sugar; toss everything together.
Serve topped with bean sprouts, green onions, and crushed peanuts.

recipes.title: Beef Stew
instructions: Brown beef in batches in a heavy pot over high heat.
Sauté onion until soft, then stir in tomato paste.
Return beef to the pot, add broth and Worcestershire sauce.
Add vegetables and simmer on low heat for 1.5–2 hours until beef is tender.
